arts.ttl: Chelsea lining up to snap up ‘super talent’ – Already presented ‘concept’ to entourage
arts.sum: Chelsea are chasing German U19 ‘super talent’ Kofi Jeremy Amoako from VfL Wolfsburg as they continue targeting top talent. That’s according to BILD, who report that Chelse have been watching the 19-year-old this season as he’s impressed on loan at VfL Osnabrück. He joined 3. arts.ttl: Champions League fixture dates for Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa confirmed
arts.sum: The last 16 first legs will be played on 4 and 5 March, with the return legs on 11 and 12 March

arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Enzo Maresca makes HUGE summer transfer decision
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly want to re-introduce Renato Veiga into the first-team fold following his loan spell at Juventus . Veiga was largely deployed at left-back following his arrival at Chelsea, although his preferred role is as a central defender and he has excelled in this position since joining Juventus.

arts.ttl: UECL draw: Chelsea to face Copenhagen in last 16
arts.sum: Chelsea were paired with Copenhagen in the round of 16 of the UEFA Conference League on Friday.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery previews 'very good test' vs Chelsea, makes admission about the reverse fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Chelsea on Saturday evening in a fascinating Premier League fixture at Villa Park. From a Chelsea perspective, they go into the weekend...

arts.ttl: Official says it’s difficult for player heading to Chelsea to represent club again – Social media comments impacted him
arts.sum: In June 2023, Chelsea reached an agreement with Independiente del Valle for Kendry Páez to arrive at Stamford Bridge in the summer of 2025, after he turns 18 years of age. Páez will turn 18 in May but has already made a trip to London.
